items.title: Paper Review is built to act more like a careful technical reviewer than a grammar checke…
items.title_zh: 论文审阅的目的更像是一位细心的技术审阅者，而不是语法检查者……
items.description: Paper Review is built to act more like a careful technical reviewer than a grammar checker. It looks for issues in math, derivations, notation, units, structure, and whether a paper’s claims are actually supported by the results. It also c…
items.description_zh: 论文审阅更像是一个仔细的技术审阅者，而不是语法检查者。它寻找数学、推导、符号、单位、结构方面的问题，以及论文的主张是否得到结果的实际支持。它还可以…

items.title: Many designers and eng.
items.description: Many designers and eng. do well when you ask them to think through product questions in abstract. But you have to take away the IDE/figma or they tend to dive right into coding/designing exactly what was asked for. More designers should be…
items.description_zh: 许多设计师和工程师。当你要求他们抽象地思考产品问题时，他们会做得很好。但你必须拿走 IDE/figma，否则他们往往会直接投入到所需的编码/设计中。更多的设计师应该...

items.title: done about 10 of these calls so far + looked at more transcripts many learnings but one o…
items.title_zh: 到目前为止，已经完成了大约 10 个这样的电话 + 查看了更多记录，学到了很多知识，但其中一个……
items.description: done about 10 of these calls so far + looked at more transcripts many learnings but one of the biggest is that it's very easy to spend a lot of tokens on open ended verification that doesn't make your output better I'll try and write more…
items.description_zh: 到目前为止，已经完成了大约 10 个这样的调用 + 查看了更多的记录，学到了很多知识，但最大的一个是，很容易在开放式验证上花费大量代币，但这并不会让你的输出更好，我会尝试写更多…

items.title: Always a pleasure to speak at @ycombinator.
items.title_zh: 总是很高兴在@ycombinator 发言。
items.description: Always a pleasure to speak at @ycombinator. More bullish than ever. Exceptional founders. Best city, best time, best opportunity to build in generations. https://t.co/YWjCu3Ldo6
items.description_zh: 总是很高兴在@ycombinator 发言。比以往任何时候都更加看涨。杰出的创始人。最好的城市、最好的时间、最好的机会，世代相传。 https://t.co/YWjCu3Ldo6
